name: Occupational Personality Questionnaire (OPQ)
description: Measures workplace personality preferences and behavioral style to support hiring, development, and leadership decisions.

name: Verify Interactive - Numerical Reasoning
description: Assesses numerical reasoning through interactive business-relevant tasks for roles that require interpreting data and solving quantitative problems.

name: Verify Interactive - Deductive Reasoning
description: Measures logical reasoning and the ability to draw sound conclusions from rules and information.

name: Verify Interactive - Inductive Reasoning
description: Assesses pattern recognition and abstract reasoning for roles requiring problem solving with unfamiliar information.

name: Verify G+
description: Provides a broad cognitive ability measure across numerical, deductive, and inductive reasoning.

name: SHL Coding Interview
description: Evaluates software engineering candidates using coding exercises and technical problem-solving tasks.

name: SHL Coding Simulation
description: Measures programming capability in a practical simulation for developer and technical hiring.

name: Situational Judgement Test
description: Presents workplace scenarios to assess judgement, behavior, and fit for role-relevant situations.

name: Motivation Questionnaire (MQ)
description: Explores motivational drivers and workplace preferences to help predict engagement and fit.

name: Graduate 8.0 Job Focused Assessment
description: Combines role-relevant measures for early career and graduate hiring decisions.

name: Sales Assessment
description: Assesses sales potential, behaviors, and role-relevant capabilities for sales hiring.

name: Leadership Assessment
description: Evaluates leadership potential, management behavior, and readiness for people-leadership roles.
